rationale: Top-level review summary only; no actionable change request beyond the inline comments handled separately.
Replaced render-time lazy construction with a static module-level registry of lazy page components.
Changed supported-page detection to Object.hasOwn and added a regression test for inherited keys such as toString.
Updated the 503 UI-assets message to reference the shared mission-control entrypoint and the page being rendered, and covered it in tests.
Removed the unused TemplateResponse data_wide_panel context so layout state comes only from boot_payload.initialData.layout.dataWidePanel.
Automated PR overview only; no separate actionable request outside the inline comments already classified above.
